title: Ocean Wave Function
body: A swimmer in the ocean observes one day that the ocean surface waves are periodic and resemble a sine wave. The swimmer estimates that the vertical distance between the crest and the trough of each wave is approximately $$0.45$$ $$m$$, and the distance between each crest is approximately $$1.8$$ $$m$$. The swimmer counts that $$12$$ waves pass every two minutes.
